summary: campaign-C Task 6 (readout-metrics) PASS (9/10, ready) at round 3. Verification phase + legibility fixes. Audit (refine-logs/readout-metrics/AUDIT.md): every bits column on synthesis.html + all per-surface/per-probe pages already carried a same-row per-secret recovery readout (prior standardization passes did the pairing); the one bits-without-recovery table (probe-vcap estimator-repair) is a calibration diagnostic, now explicitly labeled in-page. Edits: (1) resid-rep2text length table gained the constant capacity I_G (bits)=2856 column so the vacuous-capacity signature is legible in-table (harmonizes with synthesis row); (2) round-1 reviewer caught a real legibility-contract miss -> bnn H(V|Y)=0.03 bits at e=80 now renders 30 mbit and the source-rounded 0.00 rows render ~=0 (not a toFixed(2) collapse), applied to synthesis.html static cells + a fmtBits JS helper in bnn-attack.html; (3) probe-vcap exemption labeled in-page; (4) audit wording corrected (retracted false 'no bits value in (0,0.1)', weakened 'mirrors format_bits' to 'relevant display branch', documented unit convention). Task-7 queue file (queued-for-utility.md): no NEW model-required recovery-readout gaps; only the two plaintext baselines already queued by Task 4 remain, plus a BNN full-precision H(V|Y) display-precision debt note. No GPU run. Round 1 6/10 almost -> round 2 8/10 almost -> round 3 9/10 ready.
